_안내: 이 파일만 고치면 사이트 전체(이름/소개/연락처/링크)가 바뀝니다. 따옴표 안의 내용만 바꾸세요.
name: Your Name
affiliation: Your Lab · Dept. of XXX · Your University
field: Your research area (e.g., Machine Learning, Computer Vision)
tagline: A place where I document my research and review the papers I read.
about: Hi, I'm a master's student researching XXX. On this site I introduce my research and post reviews of papers I've read, written in my own words. (Edit this text in data/profile.json under 'about'.)

research.summary: I'm currently interested in the problem of XXX, which I approach using YYY. (Edit this in data/profile.json under research.summary.)

_링크안내: 보이고 싶은 링크는 url을 채우고, 숨기고 싶은 링크는 url을 빈 문자열("")로 두세요.
